first_run.rationale: The core reasoning in both evaluations is identical, focusing on the candidate being overqualified, lacking specific PostgreSQL experience, and a potential conflict with on-site work requirements. The slight drop in score and minor rephrasing of concerns (e.g., general 'remote work preferences' vs. specific 'remote-friendly roles') are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new logic tied to the location change from Berlin to San Francisco.
